basic_details.job_title: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Presidency University has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 04-08-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc/MS/BS-MS or equivalent in any branches of Biology with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. Qualification in NET/JRF/LS/PhD or GATE is required.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: MSc/MS/BS-MS or equivalent in any branches of Biology with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade from any recognized board/University. Qualification in the National Eligibility Test at the JRF/LS/PhD only level or Graduate Aptitude Test for Engineering (GATE). Previous hands-on experience in cell culture, mouse handling and molecular biology techniques. Prior experience in bioinformatics based applications.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: INR 37,000 + 30% HRA per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.presidency_university: MSc/MS/BS-MS or equivalent in any branches of Biology with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. Qualification in NET/JRF/LS/PhD or GATE is required.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Presidency University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: MSc/MS/BS-MS or equivalent in any branches of Biology with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade from any recognized board/University. Qualification in the National Eligibility Test at the JRF/LS/PhD only level or Graduate Aptitude Test for Engineering (GATE). Previous hands-on experience in cell culture, mouse handling and molecular biology techniques. Prior experience in bioinformatics based applications.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: INR 37,000 + 30% HRA per month

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Email application with CV, research statement, and referee details. Interview (in-person mode)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at Presidency University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is August 4th, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MSc/MS/BS-MS or equivalent degree in any branch of Biology with at least 55% marks and must have qualified in NET/JRF/LS/PhD or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive INR 37,000 plus 30% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email application followed by an in-person interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to bring for the interview?
faq.answer: You need to bring a hard copy of your CV, write-up, original mark sheets/grade cards for B.Sc. and M.Sc., and your NET/GATE scorecard/rank card/certificate of award.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Presidency University located?
faq.answer: Presidency University is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700156.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the project for which the Junior Research Fellow is being hired?
faq.answer: The job is project-based, and specific project duration details are usually found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact for further queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, it is advisable to refer to the official notification or contact the provided email address for application submission.
